name: Vodou vèvè ob3ect: the ritual ground drawing made with cornmeal or powder that calls the lwa (spirits) to possess the ceremony. FSPLIT: the drawing of the vèvè splits the mundane ground into sacred space — each line and symbol is a letter in a spiritual alphabet calling a specific lwa. FFUSE: when the lwa arrives (possession), the vèvè's scattered symbols reconstitute as a living presence — the drawing becomes the spirit. VINIT: the unswept, unconsecrated ground. TANCH: the outer border of the vèvè. AFWD: a line drawn outward (invitation). AREV: a line erased or scattered (dismissal). ENGAGR: the possessed person is simultaneously themselves (their body) and the lwa (their consciousness displaced) — the paradox of mounted possession.

phase_0.domain_name: Vodou vèvè ob3ect: the ritual ground drawing made with cornmeal or powder that calls the lwa (spirits) to possess the ceremony. FSPLIT: the drawing of the vèvè splits the mundane ground into sacred space — each line and symbol is a letter in a spiritual alphabet calling a specific lwa. FFUSE: when the lwa arrives (possession), the vèvè's scattered symbols reconstitute as a living presence — the drawing becomes the spirit. VINIT: the unswept, unconsecrated ground. TANCH: the outer border of the vèvè. AFWD: a line drawn outward (invitation). AREV: a line erased or scattered (dismissal). ENGAGR: the possessed person is simultaneously themselves (their body) and the lwa (their consciousness displaced) — the paradox of mounted possession.
phase_0.boundary_condition: the outer border of the vèvè

TANCH.justification: closed boundary containing the sacred space

AREV.justification: reverse morphism sending the lwa away

CLINK.chosen_element: sequential drawing of symbols in a fixed order
CLINK.justification: composition of lines and symbols into a coherent pattern

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: the vèvè itself as a self-referential sign
IMSCRIB.justification: the drawing is its own identity, calling the specific lwa

FSPLIT.chosen_element: drawing the vèvè splits the mundane ground into sacred space
FSPLIT.justification: each line and symbol is a letter in a spiritual alphabet, branching the ordinary into multiple sacred paths

FFUSE.chosen_element: when the lwa arrives (possession), the scattered symbols reconstitute as a living presence
FFUSE.justification: the drawing becomes the spirit — the branches fuse back into the lwa's identity

EVALT.justification: lwa arrives and the ceremony proceeds

EVALF.justification: lwa does not come or the vèvè is invalid

ENGAGR.chosen_element: the possessed person is simultaneously themselves and the lwa
ENGAGR.justification: paradox of mounted possession — both identities held together

IFIX.chosen_element: the vèvè as a permanent record in ritual tradition
IFIX.justification: the pattern is fixed and repeatable, though the drawing is ephemeral

phase_2.fuse_result: the lwa's living presence (reconstituted from the symbols)

phase_3.void_description: unswept unconsecrated ground before any ritual
phase_3.both_description: possessed person — both human and lwa simultaneously

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the ritualist recognizes the ground as potential sacred space
Step 2 AREV: the ritualist sweeps the ground (descent into preparation)
Step 3 FSPLIT: the ritualist draws the vèvè, splitting ground into sacred and mundane
Step 4 AFWD: the ritualist invites the lwa with outward lines
Step 5 FFUSE: the lwa arrives and possesses a participant, fusing the symbols into presence
Step 6 CLINK: the ceremony proceeds through composed actions (songs, dances)
Step 7 IFIX: the vèvè pattern is recorded in memory or tradition
Step 8 IMSCRIB: the ritualist closes by acknowledging the lwa's departure and the ground's return

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the ritualist's knowledge of vèvè patterns
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: the cornmeal lines and symbols as communication with the lwa
phase_5.memory_mechanism: oral tradition and ritual manuals storing vèvè designs
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the ritual calendar and the lwa's preferred days
phase_5.alfs_store: the canonical vèvè for each lwa as the bootstrap store

phase_6.post_cycle_state: ground returned to mundane after ceremony (vèvè erased)
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the cycle conserves entropy: ground returns to initial state after ritual closure
